title: daphne pilosa
intro: Daphne pilosa, also known as the hairy daphne or hairy daphne shrub, is a shrubby plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Daphne pilosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Daphne pilosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
